// src/utils/api.js
const envApiBase=(process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||'').trim();const normalizedEnvApiBase=envApiBase.replace(/\/+$/,'');const isLocalHostname=function(){let hostname=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';return hostname==='localhost'||hostname==='127.0.0.1'||hostname==='0.0.0.0';};const shouldIgnoreEnvApiBase=()=>{if(!normalizedEnvApiBase||process.env.NODE_ENV!=='production'){return false;}try{const parsedUrl=new URL(normalizedEnvApiBase);const currentHostname=typeof window!=='undefined'?window.location.hostname:'';return isLocalHostname(parsedUrl.hostname)&&!isLocalHostname(currentHostname);}catch(error){return false;}};const safeEnvApiBase=shouldIgnoreEnvApiBase()?'':normalizedEnvApiBase;export const API_BASE=safeEnvApiBase||(process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'?'':'http://127.0.0.1:5000');export const buildApiUrl=path=>{if(!path){return API_BASE;}const normalizedPath=path.startsWith('/')?path:`/${path}`;if(!API_BASE){return normalizedPath;}if(API_BASE.endsWith('/api')&&normalizedPath.startsWith('/api/')){return`${API_BASE}${normalizedPath.slice(4)}`;}return`${API_BASE}${normalizedPath}`;};
